name: Grayscale Litecoin Trust
summary: The Grayscale Litecoin Trust (LTCN) is a digital asset investment product that enables investors to gain exposure to Litecoin (LTC) in the form of a security without the challenges of directly purchasing and storing the cryptocurrency. The trust's shares are designed to track the price of Litecoin, less fees and expenses. Grayscale Investments serves as the sponsor of the trust.
